_comment: Tier-2 for fourc contact/structural: catalog uses 'WALL QUAD4 ... THICK ... STRESS_STRAIN ...' in templates served by prepare_simulation. In 4C 2026.3 the eletype 'WALL' is unknown (parobjectfactory.cpp:153 'Unknown type WALL of finite element'). The real 2D structural element is 'SOLID QUAD4 ... THICKNESS ... PLANE_ASSUMPTION ...' — verified in tests/input_files/contact2D_initfield.4C.yaml from the 4C source tree. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (4C 2026.3.0-dev).
